# Balinjera Restaurant

Balinjera (באלינג'רה) is a traditional Ethiopian restaurant in Tel Aviv, Israel.

## Key information
- Cuisine: Traditional Ethiopian, specializing in injera (אינג'רה)
- Address: Malan 4 / HaKovshim 39, Kerem HaTeimanim (near Carmel Market), Tel Aviv, Israel
- Phone: 03-525-2527
- Email: fantaprada25@gmail.com
- Hours: Sunday–Thursday 12:00–20:00, Friday 11:00–15:00, Saturday closed
- Online orders: https://wolt.com/he/isr/tel-aviv/restaurant/balinjera

## Pages
- Home: https://www.balinjera.com/
- About: https://www.balinjera.com/about
- Menu: https://www.balinjera.com/menu
- Events & Catering: https://www.balinjera.com/events
- Blog: https://www.balinjera.com/blog
- Blog – Injera, Heart of the Meal: https://www.balinjera.com/blog/injera-heart-of-meal
- Blog – Eating Together at Balinjera: https://www.balinjera.com/blog/eat-together-balinjera

## Social
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ethiopianfoodrestaurant/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Traditional.Ethiopian.Cuisine/

## Languages
Primary: Hebrew (RTL). English available at all pages via the ?lang=en query parameter.
